description: Comprehensive app improvements: enhanced dashboard with monthly billing chart (CSS bars), improved clients page with WhatsApp/call buttons and invoice count, invoice list with filters/search/totals, budget duplicate and validity indicator, enhanced communications with wa.me links and new templates, weekly calendar agenda with Google Maps links and colored status, catalog management page, and UX improvements (toast notifications, loading states, confirmation dialogs).
steps: Create a reusable Toast notification component at src/components/Toast.tsx
Enhance src/app/page.tsx dashboard with monthly billing chart using CSS bars and quick access buttons
Enhance src/app/clientes/page.tsx with WhatsApp/call buttons (tel: and wa.me links), invoice count per client
Enhance src/app/facturas/page.tsx with status filters, search bar, and totals summary at top
Enhance src/app/presupuestos/page.tsx with duplicate button, validity indicator (expired in red), and direct convert-to-invoice button
Enhance src/app/comunicaciones/page.tsx with wa.me direct links, new templates (payment reminder, accepted budget), filter by client
Enhance src/app/agenda/page.tsx with weekly calendar view (Mon-Fri), Google Maps links for addresses, and colored visit status
Create src/app/catalogo/page.tsx for viewing and editing the materials/services catalog
Update src/components/Sidebar.tsx to add Catalogo navigation item
Update src/lib/templates.ts with new templates for payment reminder and accepted budget with wa.me links
Update src/app/api/dashboard/route.ts to return monthly billing data for the chart
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows monthly billing chart with CSS bars (no external library)
Dashboard has quick access buttons for common actions
Clients page shows WhatsApp and call buttons with tel: and wa.me links
Invoice list has status filters, search by client/number, and totals summary
Budget page has duplicate button, validity indicator (expired shown in red), and convert to invoice button
Communications page has wa.me direct links and includes payment reminder + accepted budget templates
Agenda page has weekly calendar view with colored status indicators and Google Maps links
Catalog page allows viewing and editing materials/services
Toast notifications appear for success/error actions across pages
npx next build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx next build` in /projects/sandbox/electricista-app and confirm successful build
findings: Build passes cleanly with all new pages and components. All features implemented: dashboard billing chart, client WhatsApp/call buttons with invoice count, invoice filters/search/totals, budget duplicate/validity/convert, communications with wa.me links and client history filter, weekly calendar with Google Maps and status colors, catalog CRUD page, and global toast notifications.
